title: PEP - definitions and risk factors
body_markdown:
**Title**: PEP - definitions and risk factors
**Regulation Scope**: ASIC, ASIC & GAML
**Status**: Approved
**Owner**: AUST AML

Definitions of PEP (Politically Exposed Person), Family Member, Close Associate, Domestic PEP,
Foreign PEP, International organisation PEP. Risk factors: role and influence, geography,
source of wealth, trading activity, relationship to PEP, time in office, reputation.

No table references.
